description: Project Analyzer module: deterministic offline parser for exam/project descriptions with auto-solving via existing calc engine functions and calcDetail() output.
steps: Add 'analyzer' module key to NAV_GROUPS (start group), translations (DA/EN/FA), and renderModule switch
Create analyzerState and renderAnalyzer() function with file upload (.txt/.md) and paste textarea
Implement analyzerParseText() for text normalization (strip page numbers, headers, encoding)
Implement analyzerSegment() to split text by Opgave/sub-task structure
Implement analyzerExtract() with regex entity extraction for loads, cables, devices, transformer, earthing, temperatures, grouping
Implement analyzerMapQuestions() to detect question types and map to calc functions
Implement analyzerSolve() to auto-solve using engine functions (calcIB, officialIz, etc.)
Render results using calcDetail() for full exam-quality worked solutions
Implement safety gating: flag unparseable values with click-only confirmation chips
Implement completeness score tracking (solved vs needs-input)
Add tests verifying parser, extraction, question mapping, and solving
acceptance_criteria: Module registered as 'analyzer' in start nav group
File upload (.txt/.md) works via click-only file picker
Paste textarea available (the ONE exception to zero-typing rule)
Parser correctly normalizes text and segments by Opgave
Regex extraction handles Danish exam phrasing patterns
Questions are mapped to correct calc functions
Auto-solve produces correct results using existing engine
Results rendered with calcDetail() showing full formula/substitution/steps
Safety gating: unparseable values flagged, not guessed
New tests verify parser end-to-end with synthetic exam snippets
verification: Parser tests exercise 2-3 synthetic exam snippets end-to-end
